title: トーセンジョーダン登場！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've always liked fun things more than annoying
stuff.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Jordan! ☆ Wanna grab a burger after
school?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I heard this shop is doing a collab with that brand
you like, and you can get a special shopping bag!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: No cap?! We've gotta go, then!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hang on, Jordan! Bananas are considered a snack!
Don't forget the shopping bag!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Really?! Okay then, I'll pick up some bananas
too...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Wait, what do bananas have to do with
anything?! I don't care about bananas!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Ahahaha! What a shame! Smell you later!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: The heck...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
So anyway... What do you wanna do? Go after
school?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: What's the move? ☆ Eat, chat, chill?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Oh! So about that...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
(I have no idea what's up with Golshi, but Palmer
and Helios are my besties. They're both always
down to clown, and I love 'em to death!)

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Oh crap. It's almost time.

text_block_list.name: Teacher
text_block_list.text:
Hold on, Jordan! About that literature
assignment...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Yikes... Why the scary face?

text_block_list.name: Teacher
text_block_list.text:
Why do you think?! Didn't I specifically tell
everyone to do the work themselves? So are you
going to tell me why you copied all your answers
off the others?!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Ah, well... I tried to do it myself, but like... you
know...

text_block_list.name: Teacher
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I get that you don't feel motivated, but you can't continue like this. You need to get in the habit of actually putting in the effort.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Beep, beep, beep!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Oh, time to do my nails. Later, Teach! ☆

text_block_list.name: Teacher
text_block_list.text:
Your nails?! This is far more important! Hold it
right there, Jordan!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Are you seriously gonna chase me down?! Like,
literally?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, I've been called to the director's office
along with the other trainers.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Felicitations! To all of you tackling the junior year
alongside your trainees, I wish you the best of
luck!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
We have already briefed the trainees' homeroom
teachers on the situation, so please guide your
charges while coordinating with their teachers
when necessary.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Don't forget, while the Umamusume may be
competitive athletes, they are also students of
this academy.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Here's looking forward to a fruitful three years!
We're cheering for all of you! ♪

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Ah, here you are, Jordan. And I see you've
painted your nails again. Top coat?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Oh, City?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
(On top of being a racer, City's also a
model—she's the real deal. I've got nothing but
respect!)

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
You know, the teacher asked me to tell you
something. I guess you have to do extra classes,
so you need to talk to your trainer to figure out
when.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Geez! Sorry they made you tell me!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: No biggie. I had time, and it was on my way.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, you really are a ditz, huh? Why didn't
you just tell the teacher what happened?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
How you tried to do the work yourself, but you
couldn't read any of the kanji in the questions?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: So you spent the whole day looking up how to read them on your phone?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: How'd you know that?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I heard Tickezo crying about it in the plaza
earlier.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
She was going on about how you were studying so
hard last night.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Ahhh... Well, that sounds like her.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
The thing is... I just don't really know how to
explain it. I don't think the teach would
understand.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Even so, it's important that you try.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I mean, people get the wrong idea about you
even at the best of times.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: That's true...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Okay. Anyway, I've got some business of my own.
Here, this is for you.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
It's a special nail polish recommended for sports. I
heard you're trying to strengthen your nails, so
why not try it out today?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Wow... Thank you! Yeah, 'cause today's the big
day!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: The day I really start...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's about time for my training session with Tosen
Jordan. I head to the track as scheduled, but...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Crap... You're already here. I haven't even put my
cleats on yet.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
My nails haven't dried yet. I can't run for a while.
They might split. Gotta wait.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Um... And, well...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: It's just... you're so patient all the time, even now.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
You never tell me to stop making excuses or to
stop messing with my nails.
choice_data_list: Because that would mean I'm not hearing you.
Because that would mean I'm not hearing you.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Hmm...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
So, back to what I was saying. My toenails are
fragile. If I don't take care of them, I won't be
able to run at my best.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Like, we'd be cooked if any of them split. I
wouldn't be able to enter any races.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
The truth is, I wanted to finish my nail care
earlier, but the teach just wouldn't get off my
case. So like...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Uh, you know... Um...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Exactly!
choice_data_list: Let's train once your nails are dry.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Bet!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
(I can't explain how exactly, but the person in
front of me—my trainer—is different than other
adults.)

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: (My trainer has real... trainer vibes.)

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Okay, one more!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Totally! No sweat! I've gotta get ready for my
debut race, right?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Also, I've apparently got extra classes. If they get
scheduled on my debut day, that'd be a high-key
disaster, you know? So, like, could you talk to my
teachers? Thaaanks.
choice_data_list: Whoa, why is this the first I'm hearing of this?!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Cause I'm just telling you now. Anyway, you
should be able to make them get it, seeing how
you're an adult, not to mention a trainer.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I might be dumb, but I can run with the best!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...And so, Tosen Jordan and I begin our journey
to take on the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: ...Oh. Yikes.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Huh? What's wrong?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Ah, it's nothing. I just wanna go buy a new base
coat. You know?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Oof. My toenail is mad black. It's like... natural
nail polish? Weeeird.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Seriously. Try to glow them up just a little and this
is what happens. Why have you betrayed me,
nails?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Like, come on. You're a part of me, so do what
you're supposed to and help me run!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: No doubt, I'm gonna win this!
